title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0935
summary: 1 The sole question here is whether §§ 3116 and 3115 of the Internal Revenue Code, 26 U.S.C.A., make it a criminal offense to possess property intended for use in producing nontax-paid distilled spirits in violation of the Code.
